title: Cribl Destination
description: A Cribl data output destination that receives processed events from pipelines and delivers them to analytics platforms, storage systems, and other downstream targets.

type.description: The destination type that determines the delivery protocol and configuration options

host.description: The target host address for the destination

certPath.description: Path to the TLS certificate file

privKeyPath.description: Path to the TLS private key file

caPath.description: Path to the CA certificate for server verification

rejectUnauthorized.description: Whether to reject connections with invalid certificates

description.description: A human-readable description of the destination purpose

environment.description: The environment context tag for this destination

streamtags.description: Tags used for filtering events to this destination

throttleRatePerSec.description: Maximum events per second to send to this destination

onBackpressure.description: Behavior when the destination cannot keep up with incoming events

PersistentQueue.description: Persistent queue configuration for buffering events during destination outages.

maxSize.description: Maximum queue size with unit suffix such as 1GB, 500MB

maxEvents.description: Maximum number of events to queue
